events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: Calibration work in Instrumentation & Controls. Observed field condition: as-found/as-left not recorded. Work is through testing/inspection step. This is a documentation non-compliance - calibration records are required by ISA standards and site QC. As-found/as-left data is critical for calibration traceability and quality gates. Without it, the calibration cannot be verified as compliant.

Decision: fail - non-compliant because calibration records are missing.
Risk: high - missing calibration records mean instruments may be out of tolerance without evidence.
Work stage: tested/inspected
Component conditions: non-compliant (the work/documentation is non-compliant)
Percent complete: maybe 80% - work done but documentation incomplete.
Value: 0 (no reading available)
Confidence: high, say 0.9
Findings: as-found/as-left calibration data not recorded
Actions: re-perform calibration and document as-found/as-left readings
References: ISA standards, site QC

events.label: response
events.text:

    "As-found/as-left calibration data not recorded; calibration cannot be verified as compliant",
    "Missing traceability evidence required by ISA standards and site QC quality gate"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Quarantine affected instrument(s) and place on hold",
    "Re-perform calibration with proper as-found and as-left documentation",
    "Review calibration procedure compliance with technician and supervisor"
  ],
  "rationale": "Calibration work that has passed through inspection without recorded as-found/as-left data is non-compliant. The absence of these records eliminates traceability and prevents verification that the instrument is within tolerance, so the work fails the quality gate.",
  "references": [
    "ISA standards (calibration documentation and traceability requirements)",
    "Site QC (calibration record and quality gate requirements)"
  ]
}
